title: capparis ovata var. microphylla
intro: Capparis ovata var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaf caper, is a plant species belonging to the Capparaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Capparis ovata var. microphylla is often prepared as a decoction, infused as a tea, or used as a raw ingredient in various herbal remedies.
